opportunity.title: Schedule tasks on the web
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The "scheduling" aspect often hides a deeper complexity: reliably handling rate limits and transient errors from external APIs. A robust system needs to incorporate exponential backoff with jitter and potentially a queueing mechanism—otherwise, you’ll be fighting the service’s intended usage patterns, not just scheduling tasks. It’s a subtle but crucial architectural consideration.
actions.reasoning: My work involves building agent systems that schedule and execute tasks based on web interactions, so I have relevant experience.
